query:
SELECT p.id as planId, p.date, b.id as blockId, b.title, b.startTime, b.durationMin, b.sortOrder, b.blockType
FROM dailyPlans p
LEFT JOIN scheduleBlocks b ON b.planId = p.id
WHERE p.date = CURDATE()
ORDER BY b.sortOrder;
